headline: DigitalOcean, Micron, And Rocket Lab Are Among Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (May 4-May 8): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: AI enthusiasm, strong earnings and upbeat guidance fueled massive rallies across cloud, chip, infrastructure and space stocks last week, led by DigitalOcean Holdings, Micron Technology and Rocket Lab.

headline: Consumer Tech News (May 4- 8): Big Tech Gain On AI Momentum, Pentagon Awards $500M AI Contract & More
summary: AI demand surges across chips and cloud as AMD beats estimates, Nvidia expands ecosystem deals, and OpenAI partners scale rapidly across infrastructure and enterprise.
